BandwidthSettingsRequest.description:
Body for updating Bandwidth-Controllarr settings.

All fields are optional so the dashboard can change one setting at a time.
BandwidthSettingsRequest.title: BandwidthSettingsRequest

BandwidthStatusResponse.description: Live Bandwidth-Controllarr status returned by both endpoints.

FindarrCountResponse.description:
Result of a Findarr mutation reporting how many rows it removed.

Shared by the processed-state reset and the history clear; both report a
status string and a removed-row count.
FindarrCountResponse.title: FindarrCountResponse
